events.title: 3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp
events.description: Transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp with certified facilitator Moksha
events.full_text:
3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp

Start Date: 9th October 2026, 4pm
End Date: 14th October 2026, 4pm
Location: Tiruvannamali

Experience a transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp, starting on 9th Oct. Guided by certified facilitator Moksha, this retreat offers a deep meditative experience.
